claim: LangChain and LangSmith skills enable Claude Code to navigate full agent development lifecycle without searching docs by encoding dependencies, structures, and orchestration patterns
actionable: Use LangChain skills when building agents with Claude Code to leverage pre-encoded best practices for agent architecture and tracing
source_title: LangChain & LangSmith Skills: Teach Your AI to Build Agents

claim: Skills enable agents to efficiently find the right execution path by having agents read skill documentation to understand API formats, CLI tools, and data structures without fumbling
actionable: Create skills for your agent that document expected input/output formats, CLI conventions, and data structures to improve agent task completion rates
source_title: LangChain & LangSmith Skills: Teach Your AI to Build Agents

claim: LangSmith skills allow agents to understand how to export traces and build datasets from agent runs without needing to reason about the correct API format
actionable: Use LangSmith dataset skills in agent workflows to automate the creation of evaluation datasets from production traces
source_title: LangChain & LangSmith Skills: Teach Your AI to Build Agents

claim: Agents can use evaluator skills to understand best practices for building evaluators and automatically uploading them to LangSmith for production evaluation
actionable: Define custom evaluator skills that encode your evaluation criteria so agents can automatically generate and deploy evaluators
source_title: LangChain & LangSmith Skills: Teach Your AI to Build Agents
